sources.name: Switching Costs
sources.rationale: moderate segment concentration at 55.0%; operating margin 46% vs 15% industry (extreme pricing power); gross margins 84% indicate premium pricing / low substitution

sources.name: Intangible Assets
sources.rationale: premium gross margins 84% reflect brand/IP power

sources.name: Network Effect
sources.rationale: explosive 85% revenue growth (flywheel spinning); high EPS growth 325% (operating leverage from scale)

sources.name: Cost Advantage
sources.rationale: gross margins 84% vs 40% industry (massive cost advantage); operating margin 46% vs 15% (extreme efficiency); strong free cash flow (34% of revenue)

sources.name: Efficient Scale
sources.rationale: majority revenue from one segment (55.0%); premium 84% gross margins sustained (high barriers)

analysis: Switching Costs and Intangible Assets and Network Effect create a durable competitive fortress. The company's moat is reinforced by multiple reinforcing factors, making it unlikely competitors can erode its position in the next decade.
